privileged_info_summary: The add_waiting_list task uses synthetic test data. Patient Margaret Wilson is created programmatically by the setup script with date of birth 1958-09-22, female sex, and Toronto address. Credentials are username 'oscardoc', password 'oscar' (SHA-1 hash: 45-179-551441115-117798-30877213-3052-6889-30-60), and PIN 1117. The target waiting list is named 'Orthopedic Surgery'. The required note must contain: 'Awaiting total hip replacement - left side. Moderate osteoarthritis. Target surgery date Q2 2025.' All four keywords (hip replacement, left side, osteoarthritis, 2025) are present in the note. OSCAR EMR is hosted at http://localhost:8080/oscar/login.do and runs via Docker using the open-osp stack.
